== Notes for [[Item:Q56687|Q56687]] ==

https://gw.geneanet.org/breogan?lang=en&pz=breogan&nz=amoedo+villanueva&ocz=1&m=D&p=d.francisco&n=lasso+de+mendoza+y+tamayo&siblings=on&notes=on&t=T&v=6&image=on&marriage=on&full=on

http://www.cervantesvirtual.com/descargaPdf/los-mendoza-senores-de-la-villa-de-yunquera/

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBF12E11EFBBFA9822EF79916C543A
geni:6000000081480711604

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
